ham.subject: Out of Office: Rajesh Kumar will be away till 20th April
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I am out of office from 10th April to 20th April. I will not be checking emails during this period. If you need immediate assistance, please reach out to my colleague Priya Singh at priyasingh@example.com or call 91-9876543210. For general queries, you can also contact the helpdesk at helpdesk@example.com.

I will get back to you as soon as I return.

Thanks & Regards,
Rajesh Kumar

spam.subject: IT Helpdesk Ticket #12345 - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected a potential security issue with your account. To ensure uninterrupted access, please verify your credentials by clicking the link below:

<URL>

If you do not confirm within 24 hours, your account will be temporarily suspended for security reasons. This is a mandatory step to protect your data.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best,
IT Support Team
